name: Blueprint
description: A React-based UI toolkit for building complex, data-dense web interfaces for desktop applications

description.value: A React-based UI toolkit for building complex, data-dense web interfaces for desktop applications

active-maintenance.comment: Active - last commit January 2025; 434 contributors; 3,994 commits; Blueprint 6.0 recently released

latest-release.comment: @blueprintjs/core v6.4.1 (December 2024 with active maintenance through January 2025)

styling-approach.comment: SCSS-based styling with CSS custom properties; Sass variables prefixed with $pt-; CSS classes prefixed with bp5-

component-model.comment: Styled component library with ready-to-use visuals; optimized for data-dense desktop applications

typescript.comment: Written in TypeScript (87.9% of codebase) with first-class type definitions

ssr-compatible.comment: SSR compatible; removed React.findDOMNode usage in v5.0 for better SSR support

rsc-compatible.comment: Not RSC compatible; components require client-side JavaScript for interactivity

design-system.comment: Palantir's custom design system optimized for complex data-dense interfaces

dark-mode.comment: Built-in dark mode via bp5-dark class; separate blueprint-dark.css stylesheet; CSS variables updated automatically

theming-system.comment: Theming via Sass variables ($pt-* prefix) controlling colors, spacing, typography, shadows; CSS custom properties for runtime customization

css-variables.comment: Uses CSS custom properties for theming; dark theme switching handled by CSS variables

design-tokens.comment: Sass variables as design tokens: $pt-dark-dialog-box-shadow, $pt-dark-input-box-shadow, etc.

text-input.comment: InputGroup component with text, password, search variants and left/right elements

select.comment: HTMLSelect for native select; Select component in @blueprintjs/select for enhanced dropdown

multi-select.comment: MultiSelect component in @blueprintjs/select renders TagInput wrapped in Popover

combobox.comment: Suggest component in @blueprintjs/select provides searchable/filterable autocomplete

checkbox.comment: Checkbox component in forms package with indeterminate state support

slider.comment: Slider component with single and range (dual-thumb) support

tag-input.comment: TagInput component for multiple tags/tokens with add/remove

date-picker.comment: DatePicker and DateInput components in @blueprintjs/datetime package

time-picker.comment: TimePicker component for hour, minute, second, millisecond selection

date-range-picker.comment: DateRangePicker and DateRangeInput components for selecting start/end dates

file-upload.comment: FileInput component for styled file upload

input-groups.comment: InputGroup component combines inputs with left/right elements (icons, buttons, text)

input-with-dropdown.comment: Not provided as distinct component; can be composed with InputGroup and Popover

button-groups.comment: ButtonGroup component for grouped buttons; SegmentedControl for toggle button groups

split-button.comment: No dedicated split button; can be composed with ButtonGroup and Menu

table.comment: HTMLTable component for basic styled tables

data-table.comment: @blueprintjs/table provides spreadsheet-like Table component with sorting, column resizing, selection; virtualized rendering for large datasets

virtual-infinite-list.comment: @blueprintjs/table has custom virtualized row rendering implementation; OverflowList handles overflow in lists

tree-view.comment: Tree component for hierarchical expandable tree structures

list-view.comment: OverflowList for responsive lists; Menu can serve as styled list

card.comment: Card and CardList components for content containers

badge.comment: No dedicated Badge component; Tag component can be used similarly

tag-chip-pill.comment: Tag component for standalone labels with removable option

calendar.comment: DatePicker displays calendar view; part of @blueprintjs/datetime package

alert.comment: Alert component for confirmation dialogs; Callout for static message banners

toast-notification.comment: Toast component with OverlayToaster for ephemeral popup notifications

progress-bar.comment: ProgressBar component for linear progress indicators

progress-circle.comment: No circular progress component; Spinner serves as indeterminate circular loader

spinner-loader.comment: Spinner component for indeterminate loading indicators

skeleton.comment: Skeleton component for content placeholders during loading

empty-state.comment: NonIdealState component for empty states, errors, and zero-data scenarios

modal-dialog.comment: Dialog component for modal overlays with focus trapping

drawer-sheet.comment: Drawer component for slide-in panels from edges

popover.comment: Popover component using Popper.js 2.x for floating content

dropdown-menu.comment: Menu, MenuItem, and MenuDivider components for dropdown menus

command-palette.comment: Omnibar component in @blueprintjs/select provides macOS spotlight-style command palette

tabs.comment: Tabs component for tab-based content switching

stepper.comment: No dedicated Stepper component; PanelStack provides wizard-like navigation

navigation-menu.comment: Navbar component for site navigation; Menu supports dropdowns

sidebar.comment: No dedicated Sidebar component; build with Drawer or custom layout

bottom-navigation.comment: No mobile-style bottom navigation; library focused on desktop applications

grid.comment: No CSS grid layout wrapper component

collapsible.comment: Collapse component for expandable/collapsible content sections

resizable.comment: ResizeSensor detects size changes; @blueprintjs/table has resizable columns

splitter.comment: No dedicated Splitter component for resizable panes

rich-text-editors.comment: No official rich text editor integration

chart-libraries.comment: No built-in chart components; commonly used with D3 or Recharts

form-libraries.comment: No official form library bindings; works with React Hook Form, Formik

animation-libraries.comment: Built-in CSS transitions for components; Collapse uses CSS transitions

icon-libraries.comment: @blueprintjs/icons package provides 500+ SVG icons; tree-shakeable icon imports

date-libraries.comment: @blueprintjs/datetime uses date-fns and date-fns-tz for date manipulation

aria-compliant.comment: Components implement WAI-ARIA patterns with proper roles and aria-* attributes

keyboard-navigation.comment: Full keyboard navigation support; Hotkeys package for custom shortcuts

screen-reader-tested.comment: No explicit documentation of screen reader testing

focus-management.comment: Focus trapping in Dialog, Drawer, and overlay components

accessibility-rating.comment: Adequate - ARIA patterns implemented, keyboard navigation, focus management; no documented screen reader testing or WCAG compliance claims

bundle-size-full.comment: ~594KB for React + Blueprint (historical measurement); icons package adds significant size with SVG paths

bundle-size-core.comment: ~73.8KB gzipped for minimal Popover import; tree-shaking with ES modules significantly reduces real-world size

tree-shakeable.comment: ES modules support tree-shaking; dynamic imports cause code splitting in Vite; icons split into individual modules in v5.0

zero-runtime.comment: JavaScript runtime required for component behavior

lazy-loading.comment: Components can be imported individually and lazy loaded; ES modules support dynamic imports

documentation-quality.comment: Good - comprehensive API reference, interactive examples in docs, TypeScript definitions; some gaps in advanced guides

interactive-docs.comment: Documentation includes live component examples with props controls

storybook.comment: No official public Storybook; documentation site serves as component explorer

figma-kit.comment: Community Figma kits available: Blueprint JS design system, Blueprint Component Library (PNNL, unofficial)

cli-generator.comment: No CLI tool; manual npm installation of packages

npm-weekly-downloads.comment: ~196,275 weekly downloads for @blueprintjs/core as of December 2024

commercial-support.comment: Apache 2.0 open source; developed by Palantir; no paid support tier

style-override.comment: className prop for custom classes; style prop; CSS variables for theming; Sass variables for build-time customization

compound-components.comment: Uses separate component exports (Menu, MenuItem) rather than compound pattern (Menu.Item)

render-props.comment: QueryList uses render props pattern; Select components use itemRenderer for custom rendering

slots.comment: No named slots pattern; uses props like leftElement, rightElement for content injection

unstyled-mode.comment: Styled library; CSS required for proper appearance; no headless mode
